82277289.title: Hannah Spencer
82277289.extract:
Hannah Kathrine Spencer (born 1991 or 1992) is an English Green Party politician who has served as the member of Parliament (MP) for Gorton and Denton since the February 2026 by-election. She has served also as a member of Trafford Council for Hale since 2023, and the leader of the Green Party group on the council from 2025.
She was the Green Party's candidate in the 2024 Greater Manchester mayoral election, where she placed fifth. She was the first Green Party member to win a by-election in the uk.
